│    Ralph               ││ Dashboard                                          │
│                        ││ Queue: 0 queued | 0 unchecked | 0 blocked          │
│ │ Dashboard            ││ Loop: idle                                         │
│ │ Overview of Ralph a… ││ Specs: idle                                        │
│                        ││ Log path: <log> │
│   Run Loop             ││                                                    │
│   Run loop controls    ││ Repo:                                              │
│                        ││ Loading repo status...                             │
│   Build Specs          ││                                                    │
│   Specs builder        ││ Status:                                            │
│                        ││ Loop: Idle                                         │
│   •••                  ││                                                    │
╰────────────────────────╯╰────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

ctrl+q quit            r run loop once
ctrl+n toggle nav      f fixup blocked
ctrl+f toggle focus    b build specs  
ctrl+h toggle help                    
ctrl+l refresh now                    
ctrl+k search                         
enter  open
